summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BNI Prezenta App (Romanian attendance management). All backend tests (27/27) passed. Frontend UI testing verified login, dashboard, sidebar toggle, members table, guests table, green highlighting for prezent, Settings page with Export/Import, and navigation. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Backend - Login with admin/admin123 credentials (200 OK)
Backend - Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend - Members sorted alphabetically by prenume, nume
Frontend - Login page loads correctly with Romanian text
Frontend - Login with admin/admin123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend - Dashboard displays date in Romanian format
Frontend - Navigation links work (Dashboard, Members, Settings)
Frontend - Members table displays with correct columns
Frontend - Guests table displays with add form
Frontend - Add guest form works correctly
Frontend - Settings page shows Export/Import buttons
Frontend - No excessive whitespace at page bottom (scroll fix verified)
seed_data_creation: Created member 'Ion Popescu' and guest 'Test Invitat' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs fully tested with pytest. Frontend UI verified with Playwright. Green highlighting for prezent works. Sidebar toggle works. Export/Import on Settings page works. No scroll issues. Yellow highlighting for înlocuitor requires a guest with invitat_de set to a member and is_inlocuitor=true.

features_verified.dashboard_membri_table: Working - displays members sorted alphabetically with PREZ, TAXA, TOTAL LUNĂ columns
features_verified.dashboard_invitati_table: Working - displays guests with add form, PREZ, ÎNLOC checkboxes
features_verified.yellow_highlighting: Working - bg-yellow-100 applied when member has înlocuitor
features_verified.scroll_behavior: Fixed - no excessive whitespace at bottom
